     it becomes the squash commit and drives release-please versioning. -->

## What & why

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] Docs that this change makes stale are updated (`docs/`, `skill/`, package READMEs)
- [ ] No gate weakened without an explicit discussion issue linked here
